visual_description: A man in a light-colored suit sits in a dimly lit room with shelves holding bowls behind him, raising his hand to his mouth as if speaking on a phone. The scene cuts to a man in a white shirt standing with his hands clasped behind his head, looking downward. Then a man in a dark suit and tie stands with his eyes closed, appearing to listen intently.
audio_description: A muffled voice is audible as the man in the suit speaks on a phone. The other scenes are quiet with minimal background noise.
